title: The Purpose and Flow of Comments in Full Stack Development
description: A flowchart showing how comments are used by developers during the coding process to explain logic, document code, and aid in debugging, but are ignored by compilers and interpreters during execution.
relationships: Developer adds comments to code for clarity -> Compiler ignores comments during processing -> Machine executes only the functional code
Comments serve as documentation -> Read by other developers or the author's future self to understand the code's purpose and logic
